source: Learning and Transferring IDs Representation in E-commerce

concepts.finding: Learning transferable ID embeddings in e-commerce. Pre-trains embeddings on source task (click prediction w/ 10B+ samples) and transfers to target tasks with limited data. Key findings: (1) ID embeddings from large-scale tasks transfer to small tasks, (2) embedding dimension matters (128-512 works well), (3) joint training with auxiliary tasks improves transfer quality.
concepts.implication: Keyword embeddings can be pre-trained on a large source task (e.g., search result prediction from logs) and transferred to keyword-intent clustering. Transfer learning reduces cold-start and improves embedding quality for rare keywords.
concepts.open_question: What source task provides the most transferable keyword embeddings for intent clustering?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Keyword embeddings pre-trained on search click prediction tasks transfer better to intent clustering than embeddings pre-trained on general web text (Wikipedia).
